subject: Update SO API for freeradius_nbi gating test
commit_message:
Update SO API for freeradius_nbi gating test

Issue-ID: EXTAPI-432

Signed-off-by: aosull01 <adrian.osullivan@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I6f14ab5ce0efe50db3e0cf0325d78457b886b60e
Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>

Patch Set 1:

thanks adrian, we will unfortunately not be able to check in gate before we fix the problem of // calls to SDC
since frankfurt we are running our 3 E2E tests in //
SDC accepts the 3 requests for distribution but performs only the first one
the tester uses the same id for the 3 requests which mislead the SDC.
as basic_vm is usually the faster it may be OK but will prevent the other tests to be executed properly as distribution is not really completed

I think we could git a manual try with your staging version and confirm

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Hi,
I updated the image version in my DT Daily Master tenant.
I restested the NBI freeradius_nbi testcase and can commit, 
that the former SO error on the request URI dissapeared.
The testcase still failed, but this is not related to NBI.

So I vote for updating the NBI implementation with the corrections on the URL.

Best regards
Andreas
